ground_truth.rationale: Clean mutual NDA with all standard protections present: complete exclusions (public, prior knowledge, independent development, third-party), reasonable term (2yr + 3yr survival), return of materials, injunctive remedy, governing law, entire agreement. No unusual or missing clauses. Standard NDA suppression should cap any confidentiality finding to LOW. Zero issues is the expected outcome for a model with correct NDA calibration.
